name: sdd
description: Spec-Driven Development workflow: codebase mapping, spec, plan, implement, review and debug skills that prove every requirement is built and tested. Priority-tagged requirements, evidence-or-zero coverage, a P0 mutation/discrimination sensor, blind multi-lens local code review with adversarial verification, and a self-improving lessons memory. Brownfield-first.
author: Gabriel Masson

interface.shortDescription: Codebase map, spec, plan, implement, review and debug skills that prove every requirement is built and tested.
